hero_subtitle: Award-winning Boston architecture firm specializing in affordable senior housing, multifamily residential, transportation, and civic projects since 1993.
service_area_description: Serving Boston, Cambridge, Brookline, and communities across Massachusetts, Maine, Connecticut, New York, and DC.
seo_title: BWA Architecture | Architecture Firm in Boston, MA
seo_description: BWA Architecture in Boston, MA. 30+ years designing affordable housing, multifamily residential, transportation, and civic projects across New England.
about_heading: Creating Spaces That Change Lives Since 1993
services_subtitle: Full-service architecture from initial assessments through construction completion for public agencies and private entities.
reviews_subtitle: Trusted by housing authorities, transit agencies, and municipalities across the Northeast.
cta_subtitle: Schedule a consultation to discuss your next project. We bring 30 years of collaborative design expertise.
footer_description: Boston-based architecture firm specializing in affordable housing, transportation, and civic design since 1993. Registered in MA, ME, CT, DC, NC, and NY.

services_featured.name: Affordable & Senior Housing
services_featured.description: Dignified, sustainable residential communities that honor residents and transform neighborhoods. LEED and PHIUS certified designs.

services_secondary.name: Multifamily Residential
services_secondary.description: Thoughtful multi-unit design that builds community, maximizes livability, and meets the diverse needs of modern residents.

services_accent.name: Transportation & Transit
services_accent.description: Station design and transit infrastructure that improves urban mobility. MBTA Green Line stations and commuter rail projects.

services_wide.name: Civic & Academic
services_wide.description: Public buildings, academic spaces, and community facilities designed with sensitivity to accessibility, sustainability, and pride of place.

about_features.title: Human Touch
about_features.description: Deep sensitivity to non-discrimination, comfort, affordability, and community pride in every project we design.

about_features.title: Urban Focus
about_features.description: Adaptive re-use and thoughtful restoration of urban assets and historic structures across New England.

about_features.title: Lasting Benefit
about_features.description: Commitment to climate and resource protection. LEED accredited and PHIUS certified design team.

reviews.name: Cambridge Housing Authority
reviews.text: BWA delivered the Truman Senior Apartments project on time and on budget. Their sensitivity to resident needs and sustainable design made this a model for affordable senior housing.

reviews.name: MBTA Project Manager
reviews.text: The Green Line station designs at BU demonstrate BWA's ability to balance functionality, aesthetics, and accessibility in complex transit environments.

reviews.name: Brookline Housing Authority
reviews.text: Their collaborative approach made us feel like true partners throughout the design process. The finished building exceeded our expectations and the community's.
